# LOXTR - Global Trade Intelligence Platform

> LOXTR is an AI-powered B2B platform that helps exporters, importers, and distributors optimize their global trade operations. It provides customs compliance, tariff analysis, lead generation, and freight forecasting tools.

## Core Products

- [LoxConvert](https://www.loxtr.com/tools/convert): AI-powered customs document analysis. Upload invoices, packing lists, or bills of lading to get instant HS code classification, tariff estimation, and compliance validation for any destination country.
- [AI Lead Radar](https://www.loxtr.com/radar): Intelligent B2B lead discovery engine. Enter a product and target markets to find verified potential buyers with AI-scored matching and web-enriched contact data.
- [LOX Predict](https://www.loxtr.com/predict): Freight rate forecasting powered by Google TimesFM 2.0 foundation model. Provides time-series price predictions with quantile-based confidence intervals and multi-carrier route optimization.
- [CRM System](https://www.loxtr.com/dashboard): Full sales automation suite with lead management, AI email generation, campaign automation, smart segments, and supply chain intelligence.

## Industry Solutions

LOXTR serves exporters across 9+ industries:
- [Textile & Apparel](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/textile)
- [Automotive Parts](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/automotive)
- [Chemicals](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/chemicals)
- [Food & Agriculture](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/food)
- [Machinery & Equipment](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/machinery)
- [Medical Devices](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/medical)
- [Construction Materials](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/construction)
- [Electronics](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/electronics)
- [Cosmetics](https://www.loxtr.com/en/industries/cosmetics)

## Key Capabilities

- HS Code classification and tariff calculation for 190+ countries
- AI-generated company leads with web scraping verification
- Freight price forecasting with 6-month horizon and confidence bands
- Multi-language support (English, Turkish)
- Document OCR and AI extraction from customs documents
- Campaign automation with AI-written cold outreach emails

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js serverless (Vercel), Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- AI: Google Gemini 2.0 Flash, Google TimesFM 2.0
- Enrichment: Scrapling web scraping framework

## API

LOXTR provides API access for:
- Lead discovery and enrichment
- Freight rate forecasting
- HS code lookup and tariff estimation
- Document analysis

## Company

LOXTR is a global trade intelligence company focused on democratizing international trade for small and medium enterprises.

**Address:** Sogutozu, Nergiz Str. No:7, F:13/N:25, 06560 Yenimahalle - Ankara / Turkey
